message:
perf: fix Ghostty rendering and add turbojpeg for faster decode

- Fix SHM write pattern for Ghostty (reopen/map/write/unmap per frame)
- Add turbojpeg for JPEG decode (~4-9ms vs 30ms with stb_image)
- Static link libturbojpeg for macOS and Linux (no runtime dependency)
- Reuse image ID for frame updates (no delete needed)
- Send mouse clicks/moves immediately (reduce input latency)
- Use stack buffers for CDP commands (reduce allocations)
- Update CI to install libjpeg-turbo for all platforms

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
+      - name: Install libjpeg-turbo (macOS)
+        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
+        run: brew install jpeg-turbo
+
+      - name: Install libjpeg-turbo (Linux)
+        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libturbojpeg0-dev
+
       - name: Build
         run: zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dtarget=${{ matrix.target }}
